title: rubus setulosus
intro: Rubus setulosus, also known as the hairy raspberry or hairy bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus setulosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus setulosus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
